title: Todoist Project
description: A project in Todoist that organizes tasks into a named, structured container.

parent_id.description: Parent project ID for nested projects

order.description: Project display order in the sidebar

is_shared.description: Whether the project is shared with collaborators

is_favorite.description: Whether the project is marked as favorite

is_inbox_project.description: Whether this is the user's Inbox project

is_team_inbox.description: Whether this is a team inbox project

url.description: Deep link URL to the project in Todoist
